tools.name: search_products
tools.description:
Search and browse products from college nation catalog by collection, variant, or price range.

Collections: all-products, new-arrivals, mens, womens, gifts, accessories, shop-lsu, shop-lsu-new-arrivals, shop-lsu-best-sellers, shop-lsu-mens, shop-lsu-womens, shop-lsu-gifts, shop-maryland, shop-maryland-mens, shop-maryland-hats, shop-maryland-gifts, shop-michigan, shop-michigan-mens, shop-michigan-best-sellers, shop-michigan-womens, shop-michigan-hats, shop-michigan-gifts, shop-syracuse, shop-syracuse-mens, shop-syracuse-best-sellers, shop-syracuse-womens, shop-syracuse-hats, shop-syracuse-gifts, shop-villanova, shop-villanova-mens, shop-villanova-best-sellers, shop-villanova-womens, shop-villanova-hats, villanova-gifts.

Supports filtering by variant options (Color, Size, Material), price range, and availability. Paginated results via 'first' and 'after' parameters.
